subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Jinab-i-Samad and Mahdi, upon them be My Glory, have attained unto the true House of God. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله جناب صمد و مهدی علیهما بهائی وارد لله الحمد ببیت حقیقی الهی فائز
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Word of God and human limitations
